home.title: When is school out?
home.subtitle: Plan something awesome for every day off.

reminderSignup.headline: Get reminded before every school closure
reminderSignup.body: We'll email you 2 weeks, 1 week, and 3 days before each break. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
reminderSignup.coppaConsent: I'm a parent or legal guardian and consent to receive these emails.
reminderSignup.success: Check your email to confirm your subscription.
reminderSignup.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
